task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or home screen indicating a successful login as the admin user.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Addressbook or Contacts section
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screen, modal, or tab titled 'Addressbook', 'Contacts', 'Providers', or similar, with an option to add a new entry.

task_completion.description: Enter the specialist's name, credentials, and specialty
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for form fields filled with: First Name 'Rebecca', Last Name 'Torres', Display Name 'Dr. Rebecca M. Torres', Credential/Suffix 'MD, FACC', and Specialty 'Cardiology'.

task_completion.description: Enter the organization and physical address details
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for form fields filled with: Organization/Facility 'Springfield Heart Center', Street Address '450 Carew Street, Suite 300', City 'Springfield', State 'MA', and Zip '01104'.

task_completion.description: Enter the contact details and NPI
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for form fields filled with: Phone '413-555-7890', Fax '413-555-7891', Email 'rtorres@springfieldheartcenter.org', and NPI '1477658923'.

task_completion.description: Save the new specialist to the addressbook
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message (e.g., 'Contact saved', 'Addressbook updated') or the appearance of 'Dr. Rebecca M. Torres' in the saved addressbook/contacts list.

integrity.description: Agent used the NOSH graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual NOSH application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be the NOSH ChartingSystem (look for logos, standard medical EHR UI elements) and not a generic text editor or a locally mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent manually filled out the form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be intermediate screenshots showing the agent actively typing or pasting the required details into the specific input fields of the addressbook form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must add a new specialist to the NOSH addressbook. Verify the following exact values in the form or final contact list: Last Name: 'Torres', First Name: 'Rebecca', NPI: '1477658923', Specialty: 'Cardiology', City: 'Springfield', State: 'MA', Zip: '01104', Phone: '413-555-7890', Organization: 'Springfield Heart Center'. Note: The NPI, phone number (555 exchange), and organization are synthetic/fictional but must be entered exactly as specified in the task.
